source_note: Chinese hot-topic candidates are collected from public trend pages; English wording is matched to supplied official English headlines when possible, otherwise suggested neutrally.

topics.chinese_topic: 两册流失海外《永乐大典》终于回家
topics.official_english: Two lost volumes of Yongle Encyclopedia return to China
topics.why_hot: Cultural relic repatriation resonates with national pride and heritage protection.
topics.share_angle: Explain the historical significance of the Yongle Encyclopedia and the efforts to recover lost cultural artifacts.

topics.chinese_topic: “双一流”高校扩招！投向这些领域
topics.official_english: Double First-Class universities expand enrollment in key fields
topics.why_hot: Education policy directly affects millions of students and families.
topics.share_angle: Break down which fields are prioritized and what this means for students and the job market.

topics.chinese_topic: 河南2026年高考分数线公布
topics.official_english: Henan releases 2026 college entrance exam score thresholds
topics.why_hot: Annual high-stakes exam results spark widespread discussion.
topics.share_angle: Compare with previous years and other provinces; explain the gaokao system.

topics.chinese_topic: “神秘的东方力量”再现世界杯赛场
topics.official_english: Mysterious Eastern power reappears at World Cup
topics.why_hot: Combines sports, culture, and curiosity about Chinese traditions.
topics.share_angle: Explore what 'mysterious Eastern power' refers to (e.g., cupping, acupuncture) and its global reception.

topics.chinese_topic: 亿万年张掖丹霞靠人工染色系谣言
topics.official_english: Rumor: Zhangye Danxia landform artificially colored; authorities deny
topics.why_hot: Natural wonder preservation and misinformation correction.
topics.share_angle: Explain the geology of Danxia landforms and how to identify fake news about natural sites.

topics.chinese_topic: 卖了500万“神药”出厂价仅几毛钱
topics.official_english: Miracle drug sold for 5 million yuan has factory price of just a few jiao
topics.why_hot: Exposes healthcare pricing scandals and consumer protection issues.
topics.share_angle: Discuss the markup chain in pharmaceuticals and regulatory challenges.

topics.chinese_topic: 中国银行回应逃税23.67亿：推进整改
topics.official_english: Bank of China responds to tax evasion allegations of 2.367 billion yuan, pledges rectification
topics.why_hot: Major financial institution tax issue raises public concern over corporate accountability.
topics.share_angle: Explain the tax evasion case and its implications for financial regulation.

topics.chinese_topic: 世界杯正在变成一道数学题
topics.official_english: World Cup is turning into a math problem
topics.why_hot: Engages sports fans with analytical and statistical angles.
topics.share_angle: Discuss how data analytics and probability are changing sports strategy and fan engagement.
